zh.lifeSummary: 當William Mauleverer III於1379年出生在英國越可爾阿可利福時，他的父親Robert Mauleverer19歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Barlow13歲。他於大約1397年與Joan Colville在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1463年在英國越可爾諾薩勒頓享年84歲，埋葬在英國越可爾諾薩勒頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Mauleverer III于1379年出生在英国越可爾阿可利福时，他的父亲Robert Mauleverer19岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Barlow13岁。他于大约1397年与Joan Colville在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1463年在英国越可爾諾薩勒頓享年84岁，埋葬在英国越可爾諾薩勒頓。

nameMeanings.name: Mauleverer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: nickname from Old French mal leverier ‘bad harrier’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When William Mauleverer III was born in 1379, in Arncliffe, Yorkshire, England, his father, Robert Mauleverer, was 19 and his mother, Lady Elizabeth Barlow, was 13. He married Joan Colville about 1397, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1463, in Northallerton, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 84, and was buried in Northallerton, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Mauleverer III est né en 1379, à Arncliffe, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Robert Mauleverer, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Barlow, avait 13 ans. Il a épousé Joan Colville environ 1397, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1463, à Northallerton, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 84 ans, et a été enterré à Northallerton, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Mauleverer III 1379 in Arncliffe, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Mauleverer 19 und seine Mutter Lady Elizabeth Barlow 13. Er hat um 1397 in Yorkshire, England Joan Colville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1463 im Alter von 84 Jahren in Northallerton, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Northallerton, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Mauleverer III è nato il nel 1379 nel Arncliffe, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Robert Mauleverer, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Lady Elizabeth Barlow, aveva 13 anni. Lui sposato Joan Colville circa 1397, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1463, nel Northallerton, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 84 anni, e fu sepolto a Northallerton, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Mauleverer IIIが1379年にイギリスヨークシュアイアアルンクリフで生まれた時，父Robert Maulevererは19歳，母Lady Elizabeth Barlowは13歳であった。約1397年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでJoan Colvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1463年にイギリスヨークシュアイアノーサラートンで84歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアノーサラートンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Mauleverer III(이)가 1379년 영국 요르크실르 아클리프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Mauleverer(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Barlow(은)는 13세였다. 그는 대략 1397년 영국 요르크실르에서 Joan Colville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1463년 영국 요르크실르 노르솔레르턴에서 84세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 노르솔레르턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Mauleverer III nasceu em 1379, em Arncliffe, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Mauleverer, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Barlow, tinha 13 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Colville aproximadamente 1397, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1463, em Northallerton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 84 anos, e foi sepultado em Northallerton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Mauleverer III родился в 1379 г. в местности арнклифф, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Mauleverer было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Barlow, 13. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Colville около 1397 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1463 г. в местности нортоллиртон, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 84 лет и был похоронен в местности нортоллиртон, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Mauleverer III nació en 1379, en Arncliffe, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Mauleverer, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Lady Elizabeth Barlow, tenía 13 años. Se casó con Joan Colville aproximadamente 1397, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1463, en Northallerton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 84 años, y fue sepultado en Northallerton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
